case_title: CREDIT BUREAU OF TAHOE TRUCKEE, A CALIF. CORP. vs. SHAO, JOHNNY T.L. AKA JOHNNY T. SHAO et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT BUREAU OF TAHOE TRUCKEE, A CALIF. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, JOHNNY T.L. AKA JOHNNY T. SHAO SHAO, HELEN AKA WAN CHU SHAO AKA HELEN W. HUANG AKA HELEN W. SHAO SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-14-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-17-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-25-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-14-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-14-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS ACTION OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
